title: Mikkeli, South Savo — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mikkeli, South Savo: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Mikkeli is a city in South Savo with a population of 54,000. A lakeside city in the Savo region, known for its cathedral, WWII headquarters museum, and lake cruises.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
